output.formatted:
The capacity of the Quba Mosque (the mosque built by Muhammad) is not available in Wikidata.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?capacity WHERE {
  wd:Q276569 wdt:P2525 ?capacity
}
```

Got no rows and 1 columns
